appDownloads.title: Download apps
appDownloads.subtitle: Install the Windows and Android app directly.
appDownloads.modalSubtitle: Install nia-todo as a native app on your device.
webInstall.title: Install on iOS
webInstall.subtitle: There is no native iOS app right now. You can still add nia-todo to your home screen as a web app.
webInstall.promptUnavailable: Apple does not offer a direct install button for this — here is the manual flow:
webInstall.ios.intro: Open nia-todo in Safari and add it to your home screen in a few steps.
webInstall.ios.step1.title: 1. Open in Safari
webInstall.ios.step1.text: Open nia-todo in Safari. Other browsers often do not show the option reliably.
webInstall.ios.step2.title: 2. Tap Share
webInstall.ios.step2.text: Tap the Share icon at the bottom of Safari.
webInstall.ios.step3.title: 3. Add to Home Screen
webInstall.ios.step3.text: Scroll the Share menu and choose “Add to Home Screen”.
webInstall.ios.step4.title: 4. Confirm Add
webInstall.ios.step4.text: Check the name and tap “Add” in the top right.
appDownloads.sidebarSubtitle: Install the desktop or Android app.

setPassword.requirements: At least 8 characters, 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, 1 digit, 1 special character.
setPassword.missingTokenIntro: No token found in the link.
setPassword.missingTokenHint: Please use the complete link from the invitation.
setPassword.canResend: You can request a new link.
setPassword.contactAdmin: Please contact an admin for a new link.
setPassword.resendSentEmail: A new link was sent by email.
setup.subtitle: First-time setup
setup.adminPasswordHint: This password is required to manage users. Requirements: at least 12 characters, 1 uppercase and 1 lowercase letter, 1 digit, 1 special character.
setup.firstUserHint: This user receives all existing data and is the first user. Email is required and will become the login name. Password requirements: at least 8 characters, 1 uppercase and 1 lowercase letter, 1 digit, 1 special character.
setup.doneMessage: Your nia-todo is set up. You will be redirected shortly...
setup.error.adminPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters long
setup.error.firstUserRequired: Username, email, and password are required
setup.error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
admin.title: nia-todo Admin
admin.login.title: Admin sign-in
admin.instance.title: Instance configuration
admin.instance.help: Base URL is used for external links. Origins and trusted proxies are line-based. Forwarded headers are only accepted from trusted proxies.
admin.email.title: SMTP
admin.user.emailStatus.unverifiedTitle: Email is saved but not verified
admin.user.login.inviteOpenTitle: Setup link has not been used yet
admin.user.apiKeysMachineTokenHint: Existing API keys remain usable as machine tokens without MFA
admin.user.createdEmailSent: User {username} created. Invitation email was sent.
admin.user.createdCopyLink: User {username} created. Copy and send the link:
admin.security.title: Require 2FA
admin.security.policyDesc: Enforces 2FA for all users. Sign-in is possible with authenticator app, passkey, or existing recovery codes. If SMTP is configured, users without authenticator/passkey can temporarily use an email code. Without an available method, they only get access to 2FA setup.
admin.security.apiKeysHelp: API keys remain usable as machine tokens. Creating and revoking own API keys requires recent MFA for MFA-required accounts.
admin.security.disablePolicyMessage: Users with their own 2FA remain protected.
admin.password.title: Change own admin password
admin.password.requirements: At least 12 characters, 1 uppercase letter, 1 lowercase letter, 1 digit, 1 special character
admin.user.createHelp: The user sets their own password through a one-time link. If email is configured, the link is sent automatically. Without SMTP, the link is shared manually; the address is then considered confirmed but not mailbox-verified.
admin.user.title: Users
admin.email.passwordStoredNote: Password is stored. Leave empty to keep it unchanged.
admin.email.invalidTestAddress: Please enter a valid test email address
admin.serverUpdate.title: Server update
admin.serverUpdate.checkingDesc: Current server version and latest release are checked.
admin.serverUpdate.dockerHelp: Docker installations are not updated from inside nia-todo. Pull the newest image and restart the stack:
admin.serverUpdate.debHelpReady: Debian installation detected. The update button runs a restricted host helper that downloads the release package and verifies SHA256 before installing.
admin.serverUpdate.debHelpUnavailable: Debian installation detected. Automatic update becomes available after this feature version has installed the update helper.
admin.serverUpdate.unsupportedHelp: This installation type is shown for visibility only and is not self-updateable.
admin.serverUpdate.reloadMessage: The server update is complete. The admin page will now clear cached app assets and reload from the updated server.
admin.serverUpdate.confirmMessage: nia-todo will download the newest release, verify the checksum, install the Debian package, and restart the server service.
admin.serverUpdate.started: Update to {version} started. The server may restart now.
admin.serverUpdate.notStarted: Update command finished without starting successfully.
admin.stats.title: Statistics
admin.stats.help: Aggregated technical statistics for capacity, load, and growth — without content, transcripts, IPs, usernames, or raw user agents.
admin.stats.platformSubtitle: {days} days client mix · currently {sessions} active sessions
admin.stats.emptyPeriod: No data in selected period yet
admin.user.reset2faMessage: Really reset 2FA for {username}? TOTP, passkeys, and remembered devices will be revoked.
admin.password.changed: Admin password changed! Please sign in again.
admin.email.help: Password/setup links use the public base URL from the instance configuration. SMTP passwords are never shown again. Without enabled email sending, addresses are considered confirmed after the manual setup link, but are not mailbox-verified.
admin.braindump.title: BrainDump AI
admin.braindump.help: Disabled by default; configure LLM/STT explicitly before enabling it for users.
admin.braindump.defaultSystemPromptHelp: Loaded from the backend's active default prompt definition. Use it as reference before appending or replacing instructions.
admin.braindump.customSystemPromptPlaceh: Optional. Leave empty to use the built-in BrainDump extractor prompt.
admin.braindump.endpointHelp: BrainDump talks to OpenAI-compatible endpoints (for example LM Studio) or directly to the Ollama API (`/api/chat`). For Ollama Cloud use `https://ollama.com` with an API key; local Ollama usually uses `http://localhost:11434` without a key.
admin.braindump.llmApiKeyStoredNote: LLM API key is stored. Leave blank to keep it, or clear it for local endpoints like LM Studio.
admin.braindump.llmApiKeyEmptyNote: No LLM API key stored. This is valid for local endpoints like LM Studio.
nativeSetup.error.noCredentials: Server URLs must not contain credentials.
nativeSetup.error.serverUnreachable: Server unreachable. Check hostname, HTTPS, and network.
nativeSetup.error.androidPasskeyBridgeBi: Android passkey bridge could not bind the server URL.
api.error.passwordSetup.emailOnlyResend: A new link can only be requested by email. Please contact an admin.
api.error.passwordSetup.resendEmailFaile: The new link could not be sent by email. Please contact an admin.

api.error.mfa.recoveryCodesNeedPrimaryFa: Recovery codes can only be generated with an active authenticator or passkey
api.error.mfa.tooManyReauthAttempts: Too many re-auth attempts. Please try again later.
api.error.passkey.challengeInvalidOrExpi: Passkey challenge is invalid or expired
api.error.passkey.challengeAlreadyUsed: Passkey challenge has already been used.
api.error.passkey.notAvailableForChallen: Passkey not available for this challenge
api.error.passkey.publicBaseUrlInvalid: Public base URL is invalid for passkeys.
api.error.passkey.publicBaseUrlHttpsRequ: Passkeys require HTTPS for the public base URL.
api.error.passkey.nativeBridgeRequired: Passkeys in native apps require the native passkey bridge first.
api.error.passkey.publicBaseUrlRequired: Passkeys require a configured public base URL.
api.error.rateLimit.login: Too many login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.
api.error.rateLimit.passwordReset: Too many requests. Please try again later.
api.error.rateLimit.api: Too many requests. Please slow down.
api.error.avatar.heicUnsupported: HEIC is not supported on this server
api.error.emailVerification.invalidOrExp: Confirmation link is invalid or expired
api.error.email.changeVerificationFailed: The confirmation email could not be sent. The email was not changed.
api.error.passwordSetup.passwordInvalid: Password does not meet the requirements
api.error.passwordSetup.passwordSet: Password set. You can now sign in.
settings.2fa.trustedDevicesLoadFailed: Active sessions / devices could not be loaded: {error}
settings.2fa.revokeTrustedMessage: This device session will be ended. If 2FA was remembered for this device, it will need 2FA again at the next login.
settings.2fa.revokeAllTrustedMessage: All active sessions will be ended and all remembered 2FA devices will be revoked. You will be signed out as well.
api.auth.trustedDevicesLoadFailed: Active sessions / devices could not be loaded
api.auth.trustedDeviceRevokeFailed: Trusted device could not be revoked
api.auth.trustedDevicesRevokeFailed: Active sessions / devices could not be revoked
appDownloads.serverHostLabel: Enter this address in the app:
quickAdd.hint: Tip: “Milk tomorrow 18:00 remind:17:30 repeat:weekly location:Home #Shopping /Cold !high” detects due date, reminder, repeat, location, project, section, and priority.
braindump.title: BrainDump
braindump.subtitle: Speak freely. I’ll turn it into todo suggestions.
braindump.section.transcriptHint: The recognized text from your recording.
braindump.hint.idle: Pauses are fine — recording stops automatically after a few seconds of silence.
braindump.hint.recording: Just start speaking — the meter shows when voice is detected.
braindump.hint.silence: Pause detected. Auto-stop in {seconds}s of silence.
braindump.hint.processing: Audio is being transcribed and converted into todo suggestions.
braindump.results.title: Found todos
braindump.results.subtitle: Review and accept.
braindump.error.unsupported: Audio recording is not supported by this browser.
braindump.quickfix.title: Title
admin.user.changeUsernameMessage: Change username from {oldUsername} to {newUsername}? Existing passkeys remain valid because they are bound to the internal user ID, but the account label stored on devices may still show the old username until passkeys are recreated. Existing sessions may keep showing the old username until the app refreshes user data.
admin.email.summary: Email delivery, sender, and setup links
admin.oidc.title: OIDC
admin.oidc.publicClientHelp: Usually leave this off. Enable it only when the OIDC provider registered this client explicitly as a public client without a secret. With a client secret, nia-todo is a confidential client.
admin.oidc.tokenAuthHelp: Auto is usually right for Pocket ID.
admin.oidc.help: User login maps strictly by verified email on both sides. Admin OIDC must be linked manually. Register the redirect URI exactly like this in the provider.
admin.oidc.adminNotLinked: Admin OIDC is not linked yet.
admin.oidc.unlinkConfirmMessage: Admin login through this OIDC identity will be unlinked. Password login remains available.
settings.overview.subtitle: Profile, security, API, and app behavior in one place.
settings.section.languageHint: Use the browser language or choose one explicitly.
settings.section.securityHint: Password, two-factor authentication, and active devices.
settings.section.apiHint: Manage access for automations and integrations.
settings.section.notificationsHint: Test browser push and native reminders.
settings.section.appHint: Desktop integration, native notifications, and global hotkeys.
braindump.hint.starting: One moment — recording will start automatically.
todo.modal.subtitle: Capture the task, then add planning details only if needed.
todo.section.scheduleHint: Deadline and reminder if this task is time-sensitive.
workspace.modalHint: Organize projects by context, team, or area.
workspace.detailsHint: Name, color, and icon for this workspace.
project.modalHint: Structure todos with a color, icon, and optional hierarchy.
project.detailsHint: Color and icon for this project.
project.organizationHint: Workspace and parent project define where this project appears.
project.share.hint: Invite other users to this project or manage existing members.
settings.braindump.title: BrainDump
settings.braindump.hint: BrainDump can remember where you place similar tasks.
settings.braindump.learning.label: Remember matching lists
settings.braindump.learning.help: When you move tasks to another list or section, BrainDump remembers that choice for your account and is more likely to suggest it next time. Audio and spoken text are not stored for this.
settings.braindump.learning.disabled: BrainDump will no longer remember assignments; existing assignments were deleted.
todo.recurring.hint: Optionally create the next occurrence automatically.
todo.recurring.requiresDeadline: Recurring todos need a deadline as the starting point.
settings.defaultReminder.title: Default reminder
settings.defaultReminder.hint: Automatically creates a reminder when a todo gets a deadline and no explicit reminder is set.
settings.defaultReminder.label: Automatic reminder for deadlines
settings.defaultReminder.help: Explicit reminders are kept and never overwritten.
settings.defaultReminder.saveFailed: Default reminder could not be saved.
settings.defaultReminder.invalidCustom: Enter a whole number: 1–8760 hours or 1–365 days.
api.auth.defaultReminderSaveFailed: Default reminder could not be saved.
todo.location.title: Location reminder
todo.location.hint: Only works in the Android app. Web/PWA can create and manage location reminders, but cannot trigger them.
todo.location.enable: Remind me when arriving at/leaving a place
todo.location.addressRequired: Choose a saved place or enter an address.
settings.places.title: Places
settings.places.hint: Save labels like Home or Work with an address. BrainDump and location reminders use these places.
todo.location.androidOnlyPillTitle: Location reminder — triggers only in the Android app
admin.user.sessionRevokeMessage: This user session will be ended immediately. If it uses a remembered 2FA device, that device will be revoked as well.
admin.user.sessionsRevokeAllMessage: All active sessions and remembered 2FA devices for {username} will be ended.

todo.comments.deleteMessage: Really delete this comment? This cannot be undone.

todo.drafts.onlineOnly: Comments and attachments on a new todo currently need an online connection.
settings.attachments.title: Attachments
settings.attachments.hint: Storage usage for your todo attachments.
admin.attachments.title: Attachments
admin.attachments.help: Controls uploads globally. Existing attachments remain visible and downloadable when uploads are disabled.
admin.attachments.allowedTypesHelp: Comma-separated file extensions, e.g. png, jpg, pdf. Dangerous active formats such as SVG/HTML/JavaScript remain blocked.
todo.attachments.typeNotAllowed: This file type is not allowed.
todo.attachments.tooMany: This todo already has the maximum number of attachments.
calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.empty.title: Nothing planned yet
calendar.empty.month: Todos with due dates appear in this month view.
calendar.empty.week: This week is clear. Due todos will appear here automatically.
calendar.empty.day: No todos are planned for this day.
